title: Midnight Crunchy Peruvian Red Snapper Papa Rellena
description: A jammy and snappy Peruvian dish featuring red snapper, kombu cold extract, and dash friendly flavors in a papa rellena form, cooked in a paella pan. This recipe is perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large paella pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the paella rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the mashed potatoes, kombu cold extract, and dash seasoning, and stir to combine.
Place the red snapper fillets on top of the potato and rice mixture.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the paella pan from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
